Sichuan Earthquake 請在仔細閱讀這封信件後,回答下列問題。
Dear Lulu, June 5, 2008
It's Mommy's twelfth letter to you. As a three-year-old child, you can't understand many things in the real
world yet. But I really can't wait to share every special experience in my life with you. That's why I decided to
write them down so that you will not miss them.
On May 12, 2008, a terrible earthquake hit Sichuan, China. It took many lives and left many heartbreaking
stories. The following is just one of them that touched me very much. A woman was found dead in a
collapsed building. After people cleaned up the rubble around her, they found that under her was a baby boy,
who was sleeping quietly. Thanks to the protection of his mother's body, the baby survived. Moreover, a
cellphone was found in the baby's wrap. On the cellphone, the mother left a message for her baby. It said, "My
dear baby, if you can survive this, please remember that I love you." It's so amazing, isn't it? The mother used
her life and love to create a "miracle."
Sorry, Lulu. I don't mean to make you cry. I just want to let you know there's nothing like a mother's love. I
love you, my baby!
MM
